title: euphrasia brownii var. collina
intro: Euphrasia brownii var. collina, commonly known as the alpine eye-bright or highland eye-bright, is a perennial plant species within the gentian family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing irritated eyes, and alleviating symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis. Euphrasia brownii var. collina is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or eye drops for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant for therapeutic purposes.
